case_level_notes: Case focused on short district residence (two months); other eligibility facts not provided.

determinations.rationale: Case packet does not provide facts about continuous residence over the statutory period.

No information about English proficiency or exceptions provided.
No information about civics knowledge or exceptions provided.

State/district residence appears to fall short of statutory minimum, warranting human review.
